production.playableLoop: Move the brass automaton through the hedge garden, collect three gems and the key, avoid patrolling sentry lamps, unlock the gate, and reach the exit.
production.objective: Collect Gems 3/3 plus Key 1/1, then cross the moon gate before the timer reaches zero.
production.failRetry: Touching a sentry lamp or timing out enters a failed state; Space resets the game state and all collectibles.

assetProvenance.fallback: Direct catalog did not provide a cohesive runtime-ready clockwork garden kit. The player, sentries, gems, key, gate, hedges, paths, moon dial, and UI are authored as a cohesive procedural mesh kit.
